fieldValues.value: RFC-028 Change A: Add srs lifecycle update <lifecycleId> command

Add an update subcommand to srs lifecycle. Synopsis: srs lifecycle update [OPTIONS] <lifecycleId>. Reads bare Lifecycle JSON from stdin (same schema as lifecycle create). The id field in stdin MUST match the positional argument. Validates schema (R2), RFC-006 VocabularyEntry substrate fields on each LifecycleState (R2a), and all RFC-006 V9 lifecycle invariants (R5): exactly-one isInitial, initial state must be active, transitions reference valid state keys, isFinal states have no outgoing transitions, transition ids unique. Full-replace write semantics (R7). Returns the stored Lifecycle JSON wrapped in the standard ok/payload envelope. Payload key: lifecycle.

Full-replace matches srs type update and srs protocol update. Bare-JSON-only input matches srs lifecycle create and srs vocabulary create (srs protocol update wrapper acceptance is a pipeline-specific exception). Caller-owned version avoids auto-increment divergence across multi-repo lifecycle definitions. The id-must-match-argument check prevents silent overwrites from pasting the wrong lifecycle JSON.
